name: Actinium Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: Actinium Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing targeted radiopharmaceutical therapeutics for oncology. Its pipeline includes ATNM-400 (non-PSMA solid tumor candidate), Actimab-A (CD33-targeted for AML/MDS and MDSC-targeting in solid tumors), Iomab-B (CD45-targeted bone marrow transplant conditioning), and Iomab-ACT (conditioning for cell and gene therapies). The company has treated over 500 patients across 15+ clinical trials and maintains an end-to-end radiopharmaceutical supply chain.

products.name: ATNM-400
products.description: Novel non-PSMA targeted radiopharmaceutical with pan-tumor potential across mCRPC, NSCLC, and breast cancer.

products.name: Actimab-A
products.description: CD33-targeted radiotherapy for AML/MDS and MDSC-depleting agent in solid tumors combined with checkpoint inhibitors.

products.name: Iomab-B
products.description: CD45-targeted conditioning agent for bone marrow transplant in relapsed/refractory AML patients; Phase 2/3 ready.

products.name: Iomab-ACT
products.description: CD45-targeted conditioning agent for CAR-T and other cell and gene therapies; three active clinical trials underway.

partnerships.description: Partnership to develop Actimab-A as a therapeutic backbone for AML and MDS.
